title: Luffy Keeps Moving Toward God
description: Dials, mantra, and guerrilla tactics make every fight in Upper Yard unpredictable and dangerous.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, 19, this scene centers on Enel, Eneru, Wyper, Shandia warrior, Shandia warriors. Dials, mantra, and guerrilla tactics make every fight in Upper Yard unpredictable and dangerous.

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: What are you still doing here, brat?

summary: Dials, mantra, and guerrilla tactics make every fight in Upper Yard unpredictable and dangerous.
